name: Chestnut Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces dry canellini beans, soaked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beans in 1/2 pint (1 1/4 cups) water until tender. Drain and reserve the stock.
2. Meanwhile, slit the chestnuts with a knife and bake in a moderate oven until soft. When cool, remove the shells and skins.
3. Chop the celery and onion and sauté them in the sauteing liquid.
4. Mix in the beans, chopped chestnuts, and 1 1/2 pints (3 3/4 cups) water. Blend to a puree.
5. Season well and dilute with a little of the reserved bean stock to reach the desired consistency.
6. Heat thoroughly. Serve with warm French bread.
